TheSeaborne-CAST.title: Cast
TheSeaborne-CAST.description: Hooks a card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. Each stack goes one card deeper. Removed when you [gold]Reel[/gold].
TheSeaborne-REEL.title: Reel
TheSeaborne-REEL.description: Pull the hooked card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Reeling can pull additional cards deeper along the hook, triggers [gold]Wet[/gold] on reeled cards, and removes [gold]Cast[/gold].
TheSeaborne-WET.title: Wet
TheSeaborne-WET.description: This card can trigger its [gold]Wet[/gold] effect when reeled. This does not count as playing it.
TheSeaborne-WATERWALL.title: Waterwall
TheSeaborne-WATERWALL.description: Blocks attack damage only if the damage is less than or equal to [gold]Waterwall[/gold]. Blocks nothing against larger hits. Removed at the start of your turn.
TheSeaborne-TORRENTS.title: Torrents
TheSeaborne-TORRENTS.description: When [gold]Waterwall[/gold] deflects an attack, returns that damage to the attacker.
TheSeaborne-GEM_SLOT.title: Gem Slot
TheSeaborne-GEM_SLOT.description: Lets The Seaborne hold one additional gem.
TheSeaborne-AMBER_GEM.title: Amber Gem
TheSeaborne-AMBER_GEM.description: The first suitable card each turn costs less and [gold]Exhausts[/gold].
TheSeaborne-RUBY_GEM.title: Ruby Gem
TheSeaborne-RUBY_GEM.description: The first suitable card each turn gains extra damage.
TheSeaborne-SAPPHIRE_GEM.title: Sapphire Gem
TheSeaborne-SAPPHIRE_GEM.description: The first suitable card each turn gains extra damage.
TheSeaborne-EMERALD_GEM.title: Emerald Gem
TheSeaborne-EMERALD_GEM.description: The first suitable card each turn gains extra buff or debuff stacks.
TheSeaborne-OPAL_GEM.title: Opal Gem
TheSeaborne-OPAL_GEM.description: The first suitable card each turn gains [gold]Cast[/gold] and [gold]Reel[/gold].
TheSeaborne-DIAMOND_GEM.title: Diamond Gem
TheSeaborne-DIAMOND_GEM.description: The first suitable card each turn gains [gold]Wet[/gold].
TheSeaborne-CANNONBALL.title: Cannonball
TheSeaborne-CANNONBALL.description: Loads 1 cannonball into your cannon. Loaded cannonballs are fired by cannon effects.
TheSeaborne-LOADED_CANNONBALL.title: Loaded Cannonball
TheSeaborne-LOADED_CANNONBALL.descriptio: Tracks cannonballs loaded into the cannon.
TheSeaborne-EXPLOSIVE_GUNPOWDER.title: Explosive Gunpowder
TheSeaborne-TRANCE.title: Trance
TheSeaborne-TRANCE.description: Enemy intent is interrupted while [gold]Trance[/gold] remains. At the start of the player turn, loses 1 plus [gold]Trance Resistance[/gold], then gains 1 [gold]Trance Resistance[/gold].
TheSeaborne-TRANCE_RESISTANCE.title: Trance Resistance
TheSeaborne-TRANCE_RESISTANCE.descriptio: Increases the amount of [gold]Trance[/gold] removed each player turn.
TheSeaborne-SLIPPERY.title: Slippery
TheSeaborne-SLIPPERY.description: Placeholder defensive keyword for Seaborne v0.1.
TheSeaborne-IMBUED.title: Imbued
TheSeaborne-IMBUED.description: Card gains double effect when a modifier is applied to it.
TheSeaborne-FISHERMANS_FORTITUDE.title: Fisherman's Fortitude
TheSeaborne-GILDED.title: Gilded
TheSeaborne-GILDED.description: The first time each turn you have 10 cards in hand, gain [gold]Energy[/gold].
TheSeaborne-JINX.title: Jinx
TheSeaborne-JINX.description: Buffs and debuffs you apply are increased.
TheSeaborne-MASTERBAIT.title: Masterbait
TheSeaborne-MASTERBAIT.description: Whenever you [gold]Reel[/gold], reel one more card.
TheSeaborne-SORCERER_FORM.title: Sorcerer Form
TheSeaborne-AUTO_CANNON.title: Auto Cannon
TheSeaborne-AUTO_CANNON.description: Fire the cannon at the start of your turn.
TheSeaborne-FULLY_LOADED.title: Fully Loaded
TheSeaborne-CANNON.title: Cannon
TheSeaborne-CANNON.description: Fires all loaded [gold]Cannonball[/gold]s when an effect tells you to fire it.
TheSeaborne-GEM.title: Gem
TheSeaborne-GEM.description: A treasure effect The Seaborne can hold. Your [gold]Gem Slot[/gold] count limits how many gems you can have equipped.
